items.title: Is Cardano Too Cheap to Ignore Right Now?
items.body: Despite trading 90% below its all-time high at $0.25, Cardano appears to be a value trap. The cryptocurrency has failed to compete with Ethereum, lost ground to Solana as the primary rival, ranks poorly in DeFi metrics, and lacks institutional investor support evidenced by the absence of spot ETFs.
